panels.description: Number of Bytes read and written from disks
panels.title: Storage IO

panels.description: Synology NAS model and serial number
panels.title: Device Info

panels.description: Power supply status. Green = Normal, Red = Failed.
panels.title: Power Status

panels.description: Thermal status as reported by DSM.
panels.title: Thermal Status

panels.description: Bad sectors per disk. Any value above 0 is a serious warning of imminent disk failure.
panels.title: Bad Sectors per Disk

panels.description: Disk RAID membership status per disk. 1=Normal, 2=Initialized, 3=NotInitialized, 4=SystemPartition, 5=Crashed.
panels.title: Disk Status

panels.description: Disk retry and identify failure counts per disk. Elevated retries are an early warning of failure before SMART flags it.
panels.title: Disk Retry & Identify Fail

panels.description: Free space as a percentage of total RAID volume size.
panels.title: RAID Free Space %

panels.description: Active connected users per service protocol (CIFS/SMB, NFS, FTP, SSH, HTTP, etc).
panels.title: Active Service Users

panels.description: Read and write throughput at the volume/share level (spaceIO metrics).
panels.title: Volume I/O Throughput (spaceIO)
